properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's the end It's the end It's the end of the journey It's the end It's the end It's the end of all things.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the West, It's the setting sun It is reaching the end of the race And I see that the time is right there It's the time of the setting sun.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And behold the great evening light has appeared for me in the West And It manifested the son of Man I believe it oh, yes I do.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yes pilgrim, it's the end of the race, Let us overcome this world and go. Oh just watch, what time is it? Let us overcome this world and go.
